chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Crl.B.A.No.S-357 of 2024 (Gaman Malik Vs. The State) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For the hearing of the bail application. 22.07.2024. None for the applicant. Mr. Shewak Rathore, D.P.G for the State. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- IRSHAD ALI SHAH, J.- It is alleged that after an armed encounter, the applicant was arrested and from him was secured an unlicensed SBBL Gun of 12 bore with four cartridges, by police party of P.S Karampur, led by HC Rabban Khan, for which the present case was registered. 2. The applicant having been refused post-arrest bail by learned Sessions Judge, Kashmore @ Kandhkot, has sought the same from this Court by way of instant application u/s. 497 Cr. PC. 3. Heard arguments and perused the record. 4. There is no independent witness to the incident. The alleged encounter proved to be ineffective one. The applicant has already been admitted to bail in police encounter case by this Court in early hours of the day. The recovery of a gun is alleged by the applicant to have been foisted on him by the police. The case has finally been challaned and there is no likelihood of absconsion or tampering with the evidence on the part of the applicant. In these circumstances, a case for the release of the applicant on bail on the point of further inquiry is made. 5. Under the discussed circumstances, the applicant is admitted to bail subject to his furnishing surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial Court. 6. The instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
